--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Jeff:

Any interest in Devils Cay (104 acres) and Hoffman
Cay (230 acres) in the
Berry Islands, Bahamas?
Price together is $36 million.
There is an additional 70 acres of Crown Land on
Hoffman that is also
available.
Total acreage is @ 400.
Islands are only 40 miles from Nassau and 150 miles
from Florida.
A 5000 ft. airstrip could be placed on Hoffman.
Customs and Immigration can be on site.
These islands are ripe for development or can be
used as a private retreat.
I can help you with all phases of development after
purchase.

Discovery Land Company is developing Baker's Bay in
the Abacos (500
acres) - lots are $2 to $10 million. They have
reservations for 80 lots.
Go to www.discoverylandco.com and click on projects
then go to Bakers Bay.

Regards,
Brian Webster
561-835-8350
